refund_policy.description: Limited refunds on standard monthly or longer service plans under specific conditions.
refund_policy.details: Refunds must be requested within 24 hours of purchase. Bandwidth usage cannot exceed 2GB or 25% of allocation (whichever is lower). Each customer limited to one refund during lifetime.

sla.notes: No explicit SLA terms found in public documentation.

payment_terms.notes: All sales final and non-refundable unless expressly stated otherwise.
